stemHtml:
Given the following NOTAM information, when can RWY 07R/25L be expected to be in operation?

>>> EDDF FRANKFURT MAIN <<< SCHEDULE: DAILY 2200-0400 RWY 07R/25L CLSD.: NOTAM ED/A0675/16 RWY 25L TDZ SLIPPERY WHEN WET. : NOTAM ED/A0588/16 >>> END OF BULLETIN <<<

options.b: From the 22nd of the month to the 4th of the next month.
options.c: From the 4th of the month to the 22nd of the month.
